name: nemp-memory
description: Persistent local memory for AI agents. Save and recall memories as local JSON with keyword-expanded search, CLAUDE.md two-way sync, auto-stack detection, agent ID tracking, and access logs. Zero-dependency, zero-cloud, plain JSON storage.
review: Privacy-first persistent memory skill with zero-dependency local JSON storage, CLAUDE.md sync, and cross-session recall. Security 9/10 — fully local, no credentials. Documentation 8/10 — exceptional README with feature demos. Core SKILL.md body needs agent trigger phrases for full discoverability.
